Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Microbenchmarking Chipsets for Giggles 40 upvotes, 2 comments
  2. Show HN: I took back Video.js after 16 years and we rewrote it to be 88% smaller 541 upvotes, 111 comments
  3. Slovenian officials catch Israeli firm Black Cube trying to manipulate vote 83 upvotes, 13 comments
  4. VNDB founder Yorhel has died 131 upvotes, 24 comments
  5. Hubble Snaps a New Dazzling Photo of the Crab Nebula 20 upvotes, 1 comments
  6. Musketeer d'Artagnan's remains believed found under Dutch church 18 upvotes, 1 comments
  7. Jury says Meta knowingly harmed children for profit, awarding landmark verdict 18 upvotes, 1 comments
  8. The Last Testaments of Richard II and Henry IV 66 upvotes, 12 comments
  9. TurboQuant: Redefining AI efficiency with extreme compression 373 upvotes, 105 comments
  10. My Astrophotography in the Movie Project Hail Mary 313 upvotes, 98 comments
  11. Flighty Airports 453 upvotes, 158 comments
  12. Quantization from the Ground Up 14 upvotes, 1 comments
  13. I wanted to build vertical SaaS for pest control, so I took a technician job 382 upvotes, 160 comments
  14. Antimatter has been transported for the first time 120 upvotes, 47 comments
  15. Show HN: I built a site that maps the web from a bounty hunter's perspective 7 upvotes, 0 comments
  16. Local LLM App by Ente 217 upvotes, 95 comments
  17. Tell HN: Litellm 1.82.7 and 1.82.8 on PyPI are compromised 853 upvotes, 462 comments
  18. Building a coding agent in Swift from scratch 36 upvotes, 12 comments
  19. Apple Business 692 upvotes, 389 comments
  20. VitruvianOS – Desktop Linux Inspired by the BeOS 270 upvotes, 168 comments
  21. Goodbye to Sora 961 upvotes, 715 comments
  22. Supreme Court Sides with Cox in Copyright Fight over Pirated Music 106 upvotes, 65 comments
  23. Thoughts on Slowing the Fuck Down 90 upvotes, 54 comments
  24. Arm AGI CPU 389 upvotes, 287 comments
  25. Why I forked httpx 211 upvotes, 148 comments
  26. A Eulogy for Vim 60 upvotes, 39 comments
  27. Looking at Unity made me understand the point of C++ coroutines 105 upvotes, 90 comments
  28. Data centers are transitioning from AC to DC 227 upvotes, 278 comments
  29. Miscellanea: The War in Iran 169 upvotes, 215 comments
  30. Sony V. Cox Decision Reversed 23 upvotes, 20 comments

Last generated 1:00am, 26 March 2026. Source here.
